page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores using the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests scoring in the top 25 percent at 3070.88. Multi-threaded performance is also notable, particularly in bzip3 decompression, which achieved a strong score of 175.59 GB/sec. Cryptographic operations perform well, as evidenced by a strong PassMark CPU encryption score of 38554.37, aided by hardware-accelerated instruction sets like AES, VAES, and SHA_NI. Other metrics, such as PassMark CPU score and Redis SET operations, fall within the average range.

With a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance offers a balanced resource profile suitable for general-purpose workloads. The lack of bundled local storage means storage costs and performance depend entirely on external block storage configurations. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring stable compute capacity. It is well-suited for applications such as database operations, multi-threaded data processing, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.8xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance powered by a 2.7 GHz AMD EPYC 9T24 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core CPU performance and robust cryptographic capabilities, supported by hardware-accelerated instructions like AES and SHA_NI. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression also ranks in the top tier, while database operations and Redis SET performance remain average. This resource profile makes the instance highly suitable for enterprise web serving, database management, and multi-threaded data processing workloads requiring consistent, dedicated compute resources without the need for local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for balanced enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8a.8xlarge features 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 128 GB RAM, delivering balanced performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and 128 GB RAM for consistent multi-threaded compute performance.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
128.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong single-core and cryptographic benchmark performance
Suited for database operations, web serving, and multi-threaded processing
